description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Phasar CI that runs on push to master and development branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use a matrix job that builds Phasar with different compilers, build types, and operating systems, including ubuntu-24.04 and ubuntu-24.04-arm. For each build configuration, checkout the repository, install dependencies, build Phasar, run unittests, and install Phasar and build examples if applicable.
